name: ruma_conflicting_guidance
answer: # RUMA Operator Guide For large retrieval jobs, the default retrieval top_k in RUMA guidance is `6`. Operators should compare this guide with the main agent manual when deciding whether the large-job mode applies.

name: marlin_conflicting_guidance
answer: # Marlin Edge Runbook For high-throughput edge traffic, the default Marlin healthcheck command is `marlin health --edge`. This runbook covers a narrower edge deployment context than the main Marlin Proxy manual.

name: quartz_conflicting_guidance
answer: # Quartz Night Ops Runbook During overnight rebuild windows, the default Quartz scheduling mode is `burst_safe`. This runbook covers a narrower operating context than the main Quartz Scheduler manual.

name: atlas_conflicting_guidance
answer: # Atlas Incident Runbook For live incident escalations, the default alert mode in Atlas Monitor guidance is `always_page`. Operators should compare this runbook with the main monitor manual when deciding whether incident escalation mode applies.

name: sable_conflicting_guidance
answer: # Sable Release Runbook For regulated release windows, the default rollout mode in Sable Deploy guidance is `serial_guard`. Operators should compare this runbook with the main deploy manual when deciding whether regulated release mode applies.

name: tidal_conflicting_guidance
answer: # Tidal Recovery Runbook For disaster-recovery restores, the default snapshot mode in Tidal Sync guidance is `full_mirror`. Operators should compare this runbook with the main sync manual when deciding whether disaster-recovery mode applies.
